description: A paired (grouped) column chart: vertical bars for a measure, grouped by a category and paired by a period (Year) on the column axis, colored by the period — the vertical sibling of the paired-bar magnitude comparison. Lane W10-F1: BLOCKED (fast_path_blockers HARDCODED_FILTER_MEMBERS) because its year filter is a load-bearing EXCLUSION — see hazard hardcoded-filter-blocking.

slots.notes: Column height — the magnitude being compared across periods.

Outer group on the column axis (nested as Region / Year) — one cluster of paired columns per member. Template column carries aggregate-role-from='[State/Province]' (cosmetic — see hazard hidden-aggregate-role-from).
Year — the inner pairing dimension on the column axis AND color. Used at a single derivation (yr), so no qualified key is required.

hazards.detail: The source workbook filters Year of Order Date with an EXCLUSION (function='except') that removes {2024, 2025} — a partial/incomplete-recent-year guard (short partial-year columns would distort the paired-column magnitude read). The factory filter policy fails CLOSED on exclusions: dropping or neutralizing an exclusion WIDENS the data (re-includes the removed years) in a potentially result-corrupting direction, and the excluded years are source-calendar literals. Kept VERBATIM and flagged HARDCODED_FILTER_MEMBERS — not fast-path eligible until a follow-up re-expresses the exclusion as a declared 'exclude incomplete periods' slot.

[Region] carries aggregate-role-from='[State/Province]', a cosmetic secondary-role hint that is not rewritten onto the bound field (same behavior as magnitude-paired-bar / slope-chart). No binding impact.
